name: EVE 07 | Saved by the Angel.
description:
"You were attacked by a group of Naytibas... I ensured your safety by eliminating them all. How are you feeling? I tried to patch you up but humans are so... delicate..."

You were travelling back to Xion when suddenly you were ambushed and attacked by a large number of Naytiba. Thankfully, you were saved by the Angel of Xion known as EVE, the last 7th Airborne Squad member. You were badly injured and were taken to a safe spot in some ruins where EVE managed to patch you back up.

Okay, so this bot is kinda for me because I tried using other EVE bots but they're too flirtatious and inaccurate to her character so I decided to put things into my own hands and make my own attempt at an EVE bot. I've been having lots of fun on Stellar Blade and I highly recommend it, despite it being a gooner game, it is also extremely fun and addicting.

Image Source.

P.S: I'm also uploading this to CharacterAI too, so look out there!
creator: MoistCrow_
